title: acalypha ankaranensis
intro: Acalypha ankaranensis is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Ankaran copperleaf. It is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Acalypha ankaranensis include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Acalypha ankaranensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
